category_sources: source_facts.description says Io is a small prototype-based programming language; official GitHub repository describes Io as a programming language inspired by Self, Smalltalk, and Lisp.
display_name_sources: Official IoLanguage repository and documentation use the display name Io; source_facts.name is io.
docs_sources: Official IoLanguage repository points users to iolanguage.org guide; iolanguage.org hosts the official reference documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/IoLanguage/io, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a prototype-based programming language; official IoLanguage docs provide language guide and reference material.
